creator: apo@gambaru.de
text:
Hello Michael,

I was under the impression that Matthias continued to support the original code base and can be considered the new maintainer of slurm. So I thought it would be a good idea to merge the FreeBSD patches with his version. The old homepage of slurm at http://wormulon.net/slurm appears to be non-existent and the distfile can only be fetched via distfiles cache.

I agree that the changes between his version and 0.3.3 are rather minor, except of the change to scons. If you think it's not worth the trouble, just view this e-mail as a pointer to new upstream activity.

Regards,

Markus
